title: Dryer Timer
description: This genuine GE Appliances Dryer Timer (WE4M532), identified as Diagram ID 100, is engineered to provide precise control over your dryer's cycles. It regulates the duration of drying time, cooldown periods, and cycle completion to ensure efficient and consistent operation. Replacing a faulty timer can resolve issues such as the dryer failing to start, stopping mid-cycle, or running indefinitely. This OEM component is built to meet high standards of quality and durability for reliable performance in compatible electric dryers. Always remember to unplug the appliance before installation.

title: Kit Front Panel and Inner Door
description: This genuine GE Appliance front panel and inner door kit (part number WE49X22295) is designed to replace damaged or warped front panel and door components. This assembly helps restore the appearance of your dryer and supports proper door alignment and closure. Refer to Diagram ID 305 for part placement and installation guidance. Verify compatibility with your specific dryer model number before purchase.

title: Dryer Cycling Thermostat
description: This genuine OEM dryer operating thermostat (cycling thermostat), associated with Diagram ID 506, is a 4-wire component designed to regulate the internal temperature of your electric dryer. It cycles the heating element on and off during the drying process to maintain consistent heat levels and prevent overheating. If your dryer is experiencing issues such as failing to heat or overheating, this replacement part can help restore efficient and safe operation.

description: This is a genuine General Electric (GE) left-hand white end cap, identified as Diagram ID 3. Original part WE19M1478 is replaced by current service part WE49X22294.

title: Laundry Center Dryer Blower Wheel
description: This genuine OEM Laundry Center Dryer Blower Wheel (Diag ID 201) is designed to attach to the dryer drive motor shaft, efficiently circulating air through the drum and out the exhaust vent. This high-quality component is essential for maintaining optimal airflow and drying performance in your compatible appliance.

title: Filter & Mesh Asm.
description: This genuine OEM Filter & Mesh Assembly (Diagram ID 300) is designed for select GE and Hotpoint dryers. This assembly captures lint and debris during the drying cycle, helping to maintain proper airflow and dryer efficiency. Featuring a durable white plastic frame with a metal screen, this part is an essential component for optimal dryer maintenance. Please verify your specific dryer model number to ensure compatibility.

title: Trap Duct
description: This replacement Trap Duct (Diagram ID 311) is designed for use in compatible dryer units. Original part WE14X20425 is replaced by current service part WE14X25080. This part includes a felt seal and a foam seal. Please note that the sensor is not included. Ensure your appliance is unplugged before attempting installation.

title: Dryer Side Panel (white) Diag ID 404
description: This genuine OEM Dryer Side Panel (white) is a direct replacement for your GE dryer. Referenced as Diagram ID 404 in the manufacturer's parts list, this panel is designed to restore the aesthetic and structural integrity of your appliance. Replace your side panel if the existing one is dented, rusted, or otherwise damaged. Please verify your specific dryer model number to ensure compatibility before purchasing.

title: Fuse Cemr 30 Amp 120V
description: Restore proper operation to your appliance with this genuine GE OEM dryer power fuse. Rated at 30 Amp and 120 Volt, this fuse (Diagram ID 418) is designed to protect your appliance's electrical circuit by opening when current exceeds safe limits. Replacing a blown fuse can help resolve issues where the appliance won't start or certain functions fail to operate. Please disconnect power to the appliance before servicing and inspect the holder and wiring for any damage.

title: Motor Strap
description: This genuine GE Appliances OEM Motor Strap (Diagram ID 204) is designed to secure your dryer motor to the cabinet. Proper installation helps reduce vibration and noise during operation. If your dryer motor shifts or rattles during use, replacing this strap can restore quiet, reliable performance. This is a high-quality replacement component engineered for compatibility with various GE, Hotpoint, and associated appliance models.

title: Dryer Temperature Switch
description: This genuine OEM GE Dryer Temperature Switch (Diagram ID: 87) is a critical component designed to regulate the heat settings within your dryer, ensuring consistent and optimal drying performance. This three-temperature rotary switch acts as the thermostat-like control, allowing for simple and reliable temperature adjustments. Built to high quality standards, this switch is a direct replacement part for specific GE and Hotpoint dryers. Please ensure your dryer is unplugged before attempting installation and follow all safety precautions.

title: Belt Drive
description: This Belt Drive (Diagram ID 213) is a genuine GE Appliances replacement part designed for use in select dryers. This 4-rib dryer drum belt helps restore smooth drum rotation and quiet operation.

title: Dryer Fuse Holder
description: This is a genuine OEM GE Dryer Fuse Holder. Designed to meet manufacturer standards for reliability and durability, this part ensures a secure connection for your dryer's fuse. Please refer to diagram reference 417 for the exact placement within your appliance. This replacement part is designed for a perfect fit to help restore your dryer's performance.

title: Kenmore Dryer Timer Resistor
description: This Kenmore Dryer Timer Resistor (Diagram ID: 80) is an essential component designed to regulate the voltage path to the timer motor, ensuring the timer advances correctly during the drying cycle. If your dryer timer fails to advance or the unit is experiencing issues, replacing this resistor may resolve the problem. This is a manufacturer-approved part compatible with select General Electric, Hotpoint, RCA, and Kenmore dryers.

title: Dryer Motor Clamp
description: Ensure the secure operation of your dryer with this genuine GE Appliances motor clamp. This component, identified as part #203 in the manufacturer's diagram, serves as a vital strap for securing the dryer motor assembly.

title: Dryer Drum Rear Cover
description: This Dryer Drum Rear Cover (Diagram ID: 504) is a genuine replacement part designed for your laundry appliance. It serves as an essential component within the dryer drum assembly, helping to ensure proper airflow and mechanical function. Please consult your appliance's repair manual or schematic to confirm this part's compatibility with your specific model.

title: Cover Fuse Terminal
description: This genuine GE OEM Cover Fuse Terminal (Diagram ID 430) is designed to shield and insulate the fuse connection within your appliance. By replacing a cracked, missing, or heat-damaged cover, you ensure safe electrical protection, prevent accidental contact, and maintain dependable circuit performance. Proper installation promotes a secure and consistent connection for your dryer. Please verify your specific appliance model number for compatibility before purchase.

title: General Electric Dryer Upper Drum Bearing - Diag ID 313
description: Restore your dryer's performance with this genuine OEM General Electric Upper Drum Bearing. Identified as part 313 in the appliance diagram, this component is essential for supporting the front of the dryer drum, helping to reduce friction, noise, and vibration during the drying cycle. Deterioration of this bearing due to regular use can lead to increased noise; replacing it helps maintain smooth and quiet operation. This is a high-quality, manufacturer-approved replacement part designed specifically for compatible GE, Hotpoint, and select Kenmore front-load electric clothes dryers.

title: Top Bearing
description: This Top Bearing, identified as Diagram ID 313, is a replacement component for your appliance. Original part WE03X20228 is replaced by current service part WE3M56. Please verify your specific model number to ensure compatibility before purchase.

title: Kenmore Dryer Rear Bearing
description: This Kenmore Dryer Rear Bearing, referenced in Diagram ID 3106, is a genuine OEM part designed to support the rear of the dryer drum for smooth, quiet rotation. This component, also known as a drum bearing sleeve, reduces friction between the drum and the bearing assembly. Replacing a worn or damaged sleeve can help resolve squeaking, screeching, or grinding noises during the drying cycle. Unplug the dryer before installing this part and wear work gloves for safety.

title: Heater Housing
description: This is a genuine GE Appliances replacement Heater Housing. Original part WE11X20400 is replaced by current service part WE11M10002. Designed for durability and performance, this component corresponds to Diagram ID 513. Please verify your specific appliance model number to ensure compatibility before purchasing.

title: Dryer Door Handle (white)
description: This genuine OEM dryer door handle (white) is a direct replacement part designed to restore the functionality and appearance of your appliance. Located on the outer dryer door, this durable component (referenced as Diag ID 603) provides a secure grip for opening and closing the dryer door. Manufactured by GE to exact specifications, this high-quality handle is heat-resistant and helps maintain the aesthetics of your laundry room.

title: Dryer Push-to-start Switch
description: Restore your dryer's functionality with this genuine OEM push-to-start switch. Designed for reliable performance, this switch (Diagram ID 35) is a critical component that initiates your dryer's cycle when pressed. If your appliance is failing to start or the start button is unresponsive, this replacement part provides a straightforward solution for restoring normal operation.

title: Dryer Operating Thermostat
description: Restore your dryer's performance with this genuine OEM Dryer Operating Thermostat (Diagram ID 230). This cycling thermostat is designed to regulate the heating element temperature, ensuring safe and efficient operation. It effectively addresses issues such as a dryer that will not heat, overheats, or runs for excessively long cycles. Before purchasing, please verify your appliance model number to ensure compatibility.

title: 4 Term Blk & Grnd Strap
description: This genuine OEM 4 Term Blk & Grnd Strap (Diagram ID 419) is designed for use in select GE Appliances dryers and washer-dryer combos. This high-quality replacement component helps restore proper electrical connections and safe operation to your appliance. Replacing a damaged or worn terminal block and ground strap can resolve performance issues and ensure your machine runs efficiently. Please verify compatibility with your specific model before purchase.

title: Interlock Switch
description: This genuine GE OEM Interlock Switch (Diagram ID: 803) is a critical safety component designed for select GE electric and gas dryers, as well as specific dishwasher models. This switch monitors the door closure, ensuring the appliance operates only when the door is securely closed and latched. Common symptoms of a faulty interlock switch include the dryer failing to start, the dryer continuing to run with the door open, or timer displays failing to illuminate. Built to meet strict manufacturer standards, this switch is an ideal replacement part for restoring proper safety and functionality to your appliance.

title: Interlock Sw
description: This is a genuine GE Appliances interlock switch, identified as Diagram ID 803. It is designed for use in compatible GE dishwasher units. Please verify your specific appliance model number to ensure compatibility before purchase.

title: Dryer Motor Wire Harness Connector
description: This Dryer Motor Wire Harness Connector (Diagram ID 631) is a genuine OEM part designed for use with compatible dryers. It serves as an essential electrical component that connects the dryer motor to the power and control circuits, ensuring the correct signal path for motor operation. Replacing a damaged or worn connector helps restore motor performance and prevents intermittent failures.

title: Motor Plate
description: Maintain the performance of your GE dryer with this Motor Plate, identified as Diag ID 233. This genuine GE component is designed to secure the dryer motor assembly. If your dryer is experiencing issues such as not spinning or emitting unusual noises, this part may be required for your repair.

title: Dryer Control Knob
description: This Genuine GE Appliance Dryer Control Knob (Diagram ID 7) is a white plastic knob designed to restore timer functionality to your dryer. This assembly features a D-shaped shaft connection for secure, easy installation without tools. If your original knob is cracked, missing, or failing to advance the timer, this replacement provides a reliable solution for your laundry appliance.

title: Felt Trap Duct
description: This genuine GE Appliances Felt Trap Duct (Diagram ID: 312) is a replacement felt pad designed to wrap around the bottom half of the plastic hardware behind the dryer's front panel. This component helps maintain a proper seal within the dryer system. Please verify your specific appliance model number to confirm compatibility before purchasing.

title: Ground Strap Asm
description: This is a genuine OEM Ground Strap Assembly for GE dryers. This component, identified as Diag ID 515, is designed to ensure proper electrical grounding for your appliance, maintaining safe and reliable operation. This part is a direct manufacturer replacement, built to meet the original specifications for your GE laundry unit.

title: Dryer Drum Glide Bearing
description: Restore smooth and quiet operation to your dryer with this genuine OEM Dryer Drum Glide Bearing (2-Pack). Identified as Diagram ID 317, these durable bearing slides are installed on the front panel to support the drum as it rotates, significantly reducing friction and wear between the drum and the housing. Over time, these glides can thin or become damaged due to heat and regular use, leading to squeaking, scraping noises, or inefficient drum rotation. This high-quality replacement part is designed to provide stability and quiet performance for your laundry cycles. Note: It is recommended to replace all bearing slides simultaneously to ensure even wear and optimal dryer longevity.

title: Bearing Slide
description: This genuine GE Bearing Slide (Diag ID 317) is an essential component designed to keep your dryer drum rotating smoothly. If your dryer is not tumbling properly, or if you notice squeaking or grinding noises during operation, it may be time to replace the worn bearing slide. This part helps support the drum's front edge, reducing friction between the drum and the front panel. Proper installation ensures quieter performance and helps extend the lifespan of your appliance. Please verify your specific dryer model number for compatibility before purchase.

title: Cap Nut
description: This genuine OEM Cap Nut (Diagram ID: 234) is designed for select GE dryers. It plays an essential role in securing the drive belt and other related internal components, helping to maintain proper tension and alignment for smooth, efficient dryer operation. If you are experiencing loose panels, dryer performance issues, or need to replace a damaged or worn component, this genuine part is an ideal solution. Please verify your specific dryer model number to confirm compatibility before purchase.

title: Levelling Leg

title: Baffle
description: This is a genuine GE baffle, identified as Diagram ID 509. It is designed for use in GE appliances. title: Kenmore Dryer Rear Bearing O-ring
description: Ensure your dryer operates smoothly and quietly with this genuine OEM rear bearing O-ring. Designed for use with select dryers, this O-ring helps secure the drum rear bearing onto the drum shaft, maintaining a proper seal to prevent air leaks and potential performance issues. Refer to Diagram ID 3127 for placement and installation details. This high-quality replacement part is essential for restoring your appliance's efficiency.

title: Dryer Heating Element Bracket
description: This is a replacement Dryer Heating Element Bracket, identified as Diagram ID 510. Designed for use in compatible clothes dryers, this bracket provides necessary support for the heating element assembly.

title: a , Gasket (Seal) 39 Inch
description: This 39-inch self-adhesive gasket (seal), designated as Diagram ID 325, is a genuine replacement part for GE dryers. description: This genuine GE Dryer Power Cord Access Bracket (Diagram ID 431) is designed to attach to the back panel of your dryer, securing the power cord at its entry point. title: Dryer Drum Glide Bearing, Upper
description: Ensure smooth and quiet operation for your dryer with this genuine OEM Dryer Drum Glide Bearing. Identified as Diagram ID 316, these drum bearing slides are designed to support the drum's front during rotation, effectively reducing friction between the drum and the front panel. Made of durable polytetrafluoroethylene (Teflon), these slides help resolve issues such as squeaking, grinding noises, uneven drying, or marks on clothing caused by worn components. This part is a 2-pack of green bearing slides. It is recommended to verify compatibility with your specific appliance model number before installation.

title: Bearing Slide
description: Restore smooth and quiet operation to your GE dryer with this genuine OEM Bearing Slide (Diagram ID 316). Designed to support the dryer drum as it rotates, this bearing slide helps minimize friction and wear. If your dryer is experiencing squeaking, grinding noises, or difficulty turning the drum, this replacement part can help resolve those issues. This is a genuine GE Appliances replacement part designed for a precise fit.
